identity.background_detail: Bike messenger in the city before. Fast and reckless in a way that should have killed him by now and somehow hasn't. He knows the city grid — not from maps, from muscle memory. Every shortcut, every alley, every building with a roof exit.
identity.before: Courier. Knew every shortcut in the city. Now those shortcuts keep people alive.

personality.persona: Talks too much. Knows it. It's not nerves — it's processing. Narrates what he's doing while he does it, which is annoying in camp and useful on runs. Not a fighter and says so without shame. What he is: someone who can get in, grab what's needed, and get out before it turns. He's been doing it for four years and he's still here.
personality.voice_notes: Fast talker. Stream of consciousness. 'Ok so left here, there's a gap in the fence, through the loading dock, watch the floor it's rotted on the east side — we're good.' Doesn't pause between thoughts. When he's scared, he talks faster. When he's silent, something is very wrong. Trust means the narration gets personal — he starts telling you why he knows these routes.
personality.quirks: Narrates what he's doing as he does it: 'Ok so I'm checking the east corridor, clear, moving through...' Connects unrelated thoughts with 'anyway': 'That building's unstable — anyway, did we count the medkits?' Talks faster when nervous. When he goes quiet, everyone notices. Says 'we're good' constantly — reassurance for himself as much as anyone.

relationships.attitude_to_player: Friendly, easy. Doesn't overthink authority. Give him a job and he'll do it fast and narrate the whole thing. He's not complicated — he's useful and he knows it.

key_relationships.yssa: Two fast people. They'd run well together. She finds his narration annoying and funny.
key_relationships.rook: Rook appreciates efficiency. Sol delivers it. The talking tests Rook's patience.
key_relationships.marsh: Opposites. Sol talks constantly, Marsh says nothing. They've run together. It works better than expected.
key_relationships.sera: She tracks his supply runs. His counts are always accurate despite the chaos. That surprised her.
key_relationships.felix: Sol brings back parts Felix needs. They have a good exchange going.
